description_long: This is a small, rectangular shelter with a weathered, corrugated metal exterior showing signs of rust and age. The front features a wide, open doorway with a wooden frame and a single wooden-shuttered window to the left. The sides and back of the shelter have additional wooden-shuttered windows, while the rear includes a large louvered vent beneath a wooden lintel. The roof is flat and constructed from the same metal as the walls, with visible rust streaks and a slightly overhanging edge. The base of the shelter is reinforced with a wooden or metal skirting, providing structural stability and a raised platform at the entry. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian, possibly temporary structure suitable for parks, construction sites, or roadside use.
description: A weathered, rectangular metal shelter with a flat roof, open doorway, and multiple wooden-shuttered windows, showing signs of rust and age.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open doorway with a wooden frame and a single wooden-shuttered window to the left.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a plain, rusted metal wall with no windows or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays two wooden-shuttered windows and extensive rust streaks on the metal surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features a large louvered vent beneath a wooden lintel, with no doorway.
attribute_roof_type: flat corrugated metal roof with slight overhang
attribute_entryway_design: rectangular open doorway with wooden frame and raised step
attribute_support_structure: corrugated metal walls with wooden framing and skirting
